market_overview.tape: Indices near highs with narrow AI/semis leadership — XLK is leading (a tailwind for the long IT names), but the cohort is crowded and valuation-stretched.
market_overview.risk_tone: cautiously risk-on with a valuation-snapback tail
market_overview.macro: FOMC Jul 28-29 (hold 3.5-3.75% expected; chair Warsh) falls inside most of these windows — the shared in-window macro event; several names also report the same week (Jul 20-30).
market_overview.earnings_cluster: Heavy IT earnings inside these windows: TDY Jul 20, IBM/NOW Jul 22, STM Jul 23, NXPI Jul 28, MSFT/TYL/GEN Jul 29-30, ANET Aug 4, ADI Aug 19.
handle_with_care: Shorts fighting bullish backdrops: NOW (Strong-Buy + in-window Jul 22 print), IBM, MSI, CSCO
STM & NXPI — long setups whose analyst targets sit BELOW / near the price
TYL — earnings AND FOMC both on Jul 29

But it's an un-armed reversal against a bearish higher-TF; wait for the turn.
FSLR.reconciliation: Engine ARM; AI cautious — policy is supportive but the setup needs confirmation.
